report.invisible_to_plan: out-of-band CREATED resources — detection is the importer-kit account sweep (resourcegroupstaggingapi), disposition import-and-adopt or delete-in-AWS (human)

verdicts.recommendation: NOTE (fixture intent): spec F8 — a dotted/slashed tag key (kubernetes.io/role/elb) carried as ONE structured pathSegments element, never re-split by the legacy display-path dot-counter. The legacy string alone ('tags.kubernetes.io/role/elb') would mis-split into 3 dot-parts and be refused; pathSegments unlocks it.
verdicts.neverDo: Never adopt values you have not read.

changedAttrs.forceNewWhy: tags are provider-wide in-place (dedicated update path)
